materials.name: Burnt Clay Brick
materials.specification: Class A, 9" x 4.5" x 3", crushing strength ≥ 3.5 MPa
materials.engineeringPurpose: Primary masonry unit for load-bearing walls
materials.maintenance: Repoint mortar every 15–20 years; inspect for efflorescence

materials.name: Portland Cement
materials.engineeringPurpose: Binder for mortar, concrete, and plaster
materials.maintenance: Store dry; use within shelf life

materials.name: Steel Reinforcement
materials.maintenance: Ensure cover ≥ 40mm; inspect for rust at cracks

materials.name: Treated Bamboo
materials.specification: Bambusa bambos or Dendrocalamus, boron treatment
disadvantages: Moisture and pest sensitive without treatment
materials.maintenance: Re-treat if exposed; inspect joints annually

materials.name: Fly Ash Block
disadvantages: Requires curing; not for direct ground contact
materials.maintenance: Protect from rain during storage and curing

materials.name: Reinforced Concrete Frame
materials.engineeringPurpose: Primary structural frame for elevated buildings
materials.maintenance: Inspect for cracks; repair spalling promptly
